name: Strata Florida Abbey & Teifi Pools
terrain: Farm track, boggy moor, open upland
highlights: Cistercian abbey to the glacial Teifi Pools string of lakes — heart of the Desert of Wales.
points_of_interest: Strata Florida Abbey (Cadw, 12th c.); Nant Stalwyn drovers' road
viewpoints: Llyn Teifi views; vast open moor
water_features: Teifi Pools (Llyn Teifi, Llyn Egnant, Llyn Hir); source of Teifi
food_drink_nearby: The Red Lion Pontrhydfendigaid; Y Talbot Tregaron
hazards_notes: Pathless moor section — compass essential; remote
